meaning: n.服务,服务性工作,服役,仪式vt.保养,维修adj.(军队)服现役的,服务性的,仆人的,耐用的
examples: The hotel has a laundry service.
The bus service is appalling now.
Unicor, a 76-year-old organization that employs 1, 100 federal prisoners in customer service call centers, shuns publicity.
The aim is to improve performance and quality of service, reduce costs, and simplify management.
